nasb.text: (for they are Your people and Your inheritance which You have brought forth from Egypt, from the midst of the iron furnace),

esv.text: (for they are your people, and your heritage, which you brought out of Egypt, from the midst of the iron furnace).

cnv.text: 因為他們是你的子民、你的產業，是你從埃及、從鐵爐中領出來的。

ccb.text: 因为他们是你的子民、你的产业，是你从埃及那熊熊的火炉里拯救出来的。
